name: FileSettings
summary: Contains static methods and properties relating Rhino files.

methods.name: AddSearchPath
methods.signature: public static int AddSearchPath(string folder, int index)
methods.summary: Adds a new imagePath to Rhino's search imagePath list. See "Options Files settings" in the Rhino help file for more details.

params.name: folder
params.doc: [in] The valid folder, or imagePath, to add.

params.name: index
params.doc: [in] A zero-based position index in the search imagePath list to insert the string. If -1, the imagePath will be appended to the end of the list.

returns.doc: The index where the item was inserted if success. -1 on failure.

methods.name: AutoSaveBeforeCommands
methods.summary: Input list of commands that force AutoSave prior to running.

methods.name: DeleteSearchPath
methods.summary: Removes an existing imagePath from Rhino's search imagePath list. See "Options Files settings" in the Rhino help file for more details.

params.name: folder
params.doc: [in] The valid folder, or imagePath, to remove.

returns.doc: true or false indicating success or failure.

methods.name: FindFile
methods.summary: Searches for a file using Rhino's search imagePath. Rhino will look for a file in the following locations: 1. The current document's folder. 2. Folder's specified in Options dialog, File tab. 3. Rhino's System folders.

params.name: fileName
params.doc: short file name to search for.

returns.doc: full imagePath on success; null on error.
A new instance containing the current state.

methods.name: GetDataFolder
methods.summary: Gets the data folder for machine or current user.

params.name: currentUser
params.doc: true if the query relates to the current user.

returns.doc: A directory to user or machine data.
A new instance containing the default state.

methods.name: GetSearchPaths
methods.summary: Returns all of the imagePath items in Rhino's search imagePath list. See "Options Files settings" in the Rhino help file for more details.

methods.name: RecentlyOpenedFiles
methods.summary: Returns a list of recently opened files. Note that this function does not check to make sure that these files still exist.

returns.doc: An array of strings with the paths to the recently opened files.

methods.name: SetAutoSaveBeforeCommands
methods.summary: Set list of commands that force AutoSave prior to running.

properties.name: AutoSaveEnabled
properties.summary: Enables or disables Rhino's automatic file saving mechanism.

properties.name: AutoSaveFile
properties.summary: the file name used by Rhino's automatic file saving mechanism.

properties.name: AutoSaveInterval
properties.summary: how often the document will be saved when Rhino's automatic file saving mechanism is enabled.

properties.name: AutoSaveMeshes
properties.summary: save render and display meshes in autosave file.

properties.name: ClipboardCopyToPreviousRhinoVersion
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value that decides if copies to the clipboard are performed in both the current and previous Rhino clipboard formats. This means you will double the size of what is saved in the clipboard but will be able to copy from the current to the previous version using the clipboard.

properties.name: ClipboardOnExit
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value that determines what to do with clipboard data on exit.

properties.name: CreateBackupFiles
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value that controls the creation of backup files.

properties.name: DefaultRuiFile
properties.summary: Gets the path to the default RUI file.

properties.name: ExecutableFolder
properties.summary: Returns the directory where the main Rhino executable is located.

properties.name: FileLockingEnabled
properties.summary: Ensure that only one person at a time can have a file open for saving.

properties.name: FileLockingOpenWarning
properties.summary: Gets or sets whether to display the information dialog which identifies computer files.

properties.name: HelpFilePath
properties.summary: Gets the Rhino help file path.

properties.name: LocalProfileDataFolder
properties.summary: Get full path to a Rhino specific sub-folder under the per-user Local (non-roaming) Profile folder. This is the folder where user-specific data is stored. On Windows 7, 8, usually someplace like: "C:\Users\[USERNAME]\AppData\Local\McNeel\Rhinoceros\[VERSION_NUMBER]\"

properties.name: SaveViewChanges
properties.summary: true for users who consider view changes a document change.

properties.name: SearchPathCount
properties.summary: Gets the amount of search paths that are currently defined.

properties.name: TemplateFile
properties.summary: Returns or sets the location of Rhino's template file.

properties.name: TemplateFolder
properties.summary: Returns or sets the location of Rhino's template files.

properties.name: WorkingFolder
properties.summary: Returns or sets Rhino's working directory, or folder. The working folder is the default folder for all file operations.
